relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file reports overdraft usage (a credit risk assessment input), while the outbound file instructs direct debit repayments on existing loans. These represent different business processes with minimal field overlap: only accountNumber is shared. The outbound file contains loan-specific data (loanId, customerId, customerName, directDebitMandateId) that cannot be sourced from overdraft usage reporting. No plausible data transformation chain connects overdraft monitoring to monthly loan repayment instructions.
